current_ui_status: target IA shell / mainline project shell
backend_capability: Meta project manifest open/create shell; current mainline does not host full workflow runtime
allowed_actions: open/create project shell; view workflow overview; view testing/developer preview state
disabled_actions: run search; import records; run screening; run statistics; generate report; export
must_not_claim: production systematic review; publication-ready workflow; clinical/regulatory evidence product
notes: Mockup should show project summary, workflow progress, blockers, recent activity placeholders, and clear testing boundary.

screen_name_zh: 研究问题与 Meta 类型
current_ui_status: target IA shell with 10 active type cards
backend_capability: active Data Extraction Schema Registry v1 represented in UI; Network Meta planned disabled
allowed_actions: enter Chinese/English research question; draft PICO/PECO/PICOS; select one of 10 active Meta types
disabled_actions: Network Meta activation; auto-final protocol; auto conclusion
must_not_claim: Network Meta available; type selection is only a tag; AI writes final question
notes: Mockup should emphasize type selection as workflow control for extraction, quality assessment, statistics, and report template.

backend_capability: Search strategy draft services exist in Meta docs; mainline shell is non-executing
allowed_actions: draft English search strategy; preview PubMed query; copy strategy; mark reviewer review needed
disabled_actions: run Chinese database search; direct CNKI/WanFang/VIP online retrieval; auto import; auto PRISMA update
gate_semantics: feature.status.testing; English-only processing; user review required
must_not_claim: Chinese database direct retrieval; automatic search conclusion; production search coverage
notes: Chinese UI can help generate English query text, but database execution and import are gated.

backend_capability: normalized literature import exists in testing docs; mainline shell should stay gated
allowed_actions: show import source options; show reference table mock data; review dedup queue; copy/import plan
disabled_actions: real file import in mockup; auto dedup merge; delete source records; auto screening start
gate_semantics: feature.status.testing; manual review; dedup pending review
must_not_claim: automatic deduplication; production library; Chinese DB online import
notes: Mockup can show RIS/NBIB/CSV rows and duplicate groups as non-production sample data.

current_ui_status: testing shell / often paired with import management
backend_capability: duplicate review v2 exists as testing workflow in docs
allowed_actions: review duplicate risk groups; select keep/merge preview; mark manual decision draft
disabled_actions: auto delete/merge; update PRISMA counts; move to screening automatically
must_not_claim: silent dedup merge; automatic final library
notes: Can be a right panel or tab in Import / Reference Management mockup.

backend_capability: title/abstract screening v2 testing workflow exists in docs
allowed_actions: mark include/exclude/uncertain as draft; view exclusion reasons; view AI suggestion as advisory
disabled_actions: AI auto exclusion; final multi-reviewer adjudication; PRISMA final counts; automatic full-text decisions
gate_semantics: feature.status.testing; manual review; AI suggestion advisory
must_not_claim: AI suggestion as automatic conclusion; final screening complete
notes: Mockup must keep reviewer as authority and show exclusion reason library as suggestion/support.

current_ui_status: testing shell with C1 concept tabs
backend_capability: full-text management and manual extraction UI are testing-level in docs; mainline shell exposes tab structure
allowed_actions: manage full-text status; design type-specific extraction form; confirm entry to extraction stage; view completion check/history
disabled_actions: Chinese PDF extraction; automatic PDF table extraction; auto final extraction; generic drag-drop field library
gate_semantics: feature.status.testing; manual extraction; schema-specific; no auto conclusion
must_not_claim: automatic extraction; OCR-ready Chinese PDF workflow; production extraction record
notes: Tabs must be: 全文管理, 提取表设计, 提取完成核查, 历史记录. No standalone 数据提取 tab.

backend_capability: quality assessment framework exists as testing docs; mainline target IA marks planned
allowed_actions: select suggested tool; view domain table; record draft judgement; show missing blocker
disabled_actions: automatic ROB/GRADE final judgement; multi-reviewer adjudication; production evidence certainty
must_not_claim: automated risk-of-bias conclusion; final GRADE certainty
notes: Mockup should vary tool by Meta type and show incomplete quality assessment as blocker.

backend_capability: statistics engine v2 exists in testing docs; mainline shell must not execute
allowed_actions: review effect-size table; validate analysis input package; preflight checks
disabled_actions: run pooled effect; run Network Meta; create formal result; generate forest plot
gate_semantics: feature.status.planned; preflight/testing boundary; no formal executor
must_not_claim: formal statistics ready; Network Meta active; production pooled estimate
notes: Mockup can show effect rows and model selection disabled/gated.

current_ui_status: shell-only / shared result report export shell
backend_capability: shared result/report/export shell available; formal results are not active in mainline
allowed_actions: view testing result boundary; acknowledge limitations; review blockers
disabled_actions: accept formal result; generate plot; add to final report; publish conclusion
must_not_claim: formal pooled effect; production interpretation; clinical recommendation
notes: Pair this with report-ready gate in prompt pack.

screen_name_zh: Forest plot / 表格预览边界
backend_capability: forest/funnel plots exist only as testing outputs in status docs, not active production UI
allowed_actions: show empty/boundary state; show required inputs; show disabled preview frame
disabled_actions: fake forest plot; fake pooled effect; fake heterogeneity table; formal statistics
must_not_claim: real forest plot without formal result; publication-ready chart
notes: If a visual chart area is included, it must be an empty boundary with no data marks.

current_ui_status: shell-only / shared result report export shell
backend_capability: report draft/testing outputs exist in docs but not report-ready product gate
allowed_actions: view report readiness blockers; view draft workflow state; acknowledge manual review needed
disabled_actions: mark report-ready; generate DOCX/HTML/PDF; create publication package
notes: Report-ready is internal draft workflow state only.

backend_capability: shared export shell exists; export actions remain disabled for mockup planning
allowed_actions: view disabled export options and reasons
disabled_actions: DOCX export; HTML export; PDF export; CSV/XLSX export; reproducibility package export
gate_semantics: exportGate disabled; report.status.draft; no file write
must_not_claim: formal export package; submitted manuscript package
notes: Can be combined with report-ready gate in high-fidelity mockup.

backend_capability: settings/log/resource entry only in target IA shell
allowed_actions: view Meta preferences; view resource/log links; developer diagnostics
disabled_actions: configure production database connectors; enable Chinese DB direct retrieval; enable Network Meta
notes: Mockup should stay quiet and technical, with developer diagnostics separated from normal workflow.
